site.name: Hotel zur Post Kiefersfelden
site.tagline: Where Bavarian hospitality is at home.

actions.loadMapHint: By clicking, you load content from Google Maps. Their privacy terms apply.

home.heroSub: A family-run inn at the Tyrolean border. Our own butchery. A parlour you’ll want to linger in.
home.leadHeadline: A house with two centuries of history – and a kitchen that started this morning at the butcher one floor below.
home.leadBody: Christine and Andi Pfeiffer are the next generation in the family. 25 rooms, 80 beds, a parlour, a beer garden and a holiday house next door. Right by Kiefersfelden station, a five-minute walk to the Tyrolean border.
home.menuFallback: No daily menu posted right now. Have a look at our main menu.
home.roomsBody: From a compact single to a family room for four. Stay longer and we’ll give you our standard rate – stay one night and you’re welcome too.
home.regionBody: Set off hiking in the morning without touching the car. In winter the trails lead toward Hocheck. If you like, Andi will take you through the village by carriage.
home.trustBody: Awarded on HolidayCheck every year since 2024.

footer.openingFallback: Opening hours – see menu page or call us.
footer.newsletterText: Seasonal menus, the Schlachtfest week, asparagus season. We get in touch four times a year.
footer.copyright: © {year} Gasthof Hotel zur Post · Owner Andreas Pfeiffer

directions.byCarText: A93 Inntal motorway, exit Kiefersfelden. On-site parking.
directions.byTrainText: Right at Kiefersfelden station. Hourly service from Munich (90 min) and Innsbruck (40 min).
directions.byPlaneText: Munich (MUC) ~90 km, Salzburg (SZG) ~80 km, Innsbruck (INN) ~75 km.

contact.headline: Contact
contact.formIntro: Drop us a line – we usually reply the same day.

fields.name: Name
fields.consent: I have read the privacy policy and agree.

cookie.title: We respect your privacy.
cookie.body: This website only uses technically required storage. External content (maps, weather, booking) loads only after your click.

errors.404Body: This page doesn’t exist (any more). The home page might help.
